calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners JianYao Liao and Xueye Wu; father and mother of minor.
Petitioner Xueye Wu sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Hiting Huang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Huifeng Wu to Anthony Huifeng Wu.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Amended
